## release class

对象释放器

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare class mk_release 
```

## Remarks

- 统一 (cc.Node/cc.Asset) 资源的释放逻辑

- 可以通过 function 或继承添加自定义释放逻辑

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [add(object\_)](./add/) |  | 添加释放对象 |
|  [release\_all()](./release_all/) |  | 释放所有对象 |
|  [release(object\_)](./release/) |  | 释放对象 |
